---
title: ""
toc: false
format: html
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, description, categories, date]
  page-size: 12
  feed: false
  categories: false
  filter-ui: true
---

Here we provide some useful information for attending **TU+ 11 (MIT, Apr 11–12, 2026)** — from presenter guidelines to tips on local transportation and hotels.

## Details by Topic

The cards below are “posts” that we keep updated as plans finalize. Click any card to read the full details.
